C

create(String[]) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Generates a new key by arguments
createTempDirectory() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Creates a temporary directory.
createTempFile() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Creates a temporary file.

D

deleteTempFiles() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Deletes all temporary files created so far.

E

exec(String...) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Executes a command.
export(WebKey, BigInteger) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Exports an PEM-encpded X509 certificate chain from a JWK.

F

formatPki(int, boolean[]) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Formats X509 PKI extensions for a certificate
formatSerial(BigInteger) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Formats a serial number as unpadded Base64 URL encoded.

I

iu.crypt.cli - package iu.crypt.cli
 
iu.util.crypt.cli - module iu.util.crypt.cli
Web crypto CLI utilities module
IuProcess - Class in iu.crypt.cli
Simple utility for executing commands using the JVM process shell environment.

K

keyUsage(WebKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Gets parameters for the X509 keyUsage PKI extension.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Main entry point.

P

parseSerial(String) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Parses a serial number from hex format consistent with OpenSSL.
passphrase() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Read a passphrase from System.in.
pem(PrintStream, X509Certificate) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Prints a X509Certificate in PEM format.
pem(PrintStream, X509CRL) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Prints a X509Certificate in PEM format.
pem(PrintStream, PrivateKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Prints a PrivateKey in PEM format.
print(PrintStream, WebKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Prints human readable key metadata.

R

read() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Reads text from System.in.

S

self(WebKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Adds a self-signed X509 certificate to the JWK.
subjectOrg() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
Reads the X509 subject organization from environment IU_CRYPT_CLI_PKI_ORG or System property iu.crypt.cli.pki.org.

T

temp(BiConsumer<PrintStream, T>, T) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.IuProcess
Writes a value to a temp file

U

USAGE - Static variable in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
CLI Usage Document, printed before stack trace if an error occurs.

W

WebKeyCli - Class in iu.crypt.cli
CLI tool for generating and manipulating WebKeys.
